title: THE TAG TEAM TAKEDOWN
description: Mark important milestones in the investigation. Tags are permanent markers in history.
story_intro:
The case was sprawling across months of commits. 'How do we mark the key moments?' my partner asked.

'Tags,' I replied. 'Permanent markers that never move. When we crack a major lead, we tag it. Future detectives will thank us.'

Time to mark our territory in history.

steps.instruction: Create a lightweight tag called 'arrest-v1' on the current commit.
steps.narrative: The first arrest was made. Mark this moment.

steps.instruction: Create an annotated tag 'case-closed-v1' with message 'First case closure'.
steps.narrative: For major milestones, annotated tags carry more weight - they have messages.
steps.hint: Create an annotated tag with a message

steps.instruction: List all tags in the repository.
steps.narrative: Let's see all our marked milestones.
Examine the annotated tag - who created it and when.
We tagged the wrong moment. Remove that marker.
